reviews.review_title: If you give me mod I’ll promote this
reviews.review_description: If you give me mod, I will promote this game everywhere including yt, tt, insta, discord, Fortnite, anywhere you can think of. I’ll get you a bunch of players to give me mod. Ingame name: rivalvr

reviews.review_title: I really only people in game
reviews.review_description: There’s not really any people in the game but I really like your face on your monkey it is really cute and the game is actually not bad but, developer is there multiplayer???￼
